title: Igluu Meal Prep Glass Oven Dish with Airtight Lid 2.2L – Set of 1 – Borosilicate Lasagne Dish for Oven, Microwave, Freezer
features: Quality Ovenware Dish: Modernise your bakeware with this large glass roasting dish; Snap locking lid and silicone ring creates a strong airtight seal for leak-free storage ensuring your food stays fresh and free from outside bacteria; Each glass tray measures 30.8 cm (l) x 18.4 cm (w) 6.2 cm (h) (Glass base only) and can hold 2.2 litres / 74 oz of hot or cold food

Easy Cook, Store & Serve: With this oven-to-table-and fridge-to-microwave dish, you can serve directly in this VERSATILE ALL-IN-ONE roaster dish without compromising on style or safety; Save time by batch cooking ahead and freezing your favourite meals for dinner parties or special occasions. Ideal for lasagnes, casseroles, pasta bakes, puddings and more

Premium Glass: Durable borosilicate glass container is non-porous so won’t absorb food odours, flavours, or stains; BPA-free food safe polypropylene plastic lid is odourless, leaving food tasting just the way you prepared it; Easy grip handles provide a safe and secure grip while taking dish from the freezer to the oven, turning whilst baking, and lifting to the table

Oven, Microwave & Freezer Safe: High Thermal Shock Resistance; Made from borosilicate glass, which is stronger than standard tempered glass; Designed to withstand high and low temperatures (-20°C to +300°C) so you can reheat or cook your food directly in the oven; A definite kitchen and dining essential, this beautiful glass dish is perfect for cooking, storing and serving straight from oven onto the dining table

Dishwasher Safe & Reusable: Non-stick surface ensures cleaning is easy; Silicone seal is removeable for hygienic thorough cleaning; Now you can do your part to remove single-use plastic from the environment
description: Product Description Reach Your Healthy Eating Goals With Igluu Meal Prep Glass Containers ______________ Say hello to Igluu Meal Prep Glass Containers! Have you been searching for ways to reduce single-use plastic in your daily routine? How much simpler would your week become if you had a food storage and preparation solution that lets you microwave or oven-cook your meal in the same storage container and easily clean it afterward - without fear of harmful chemicals leaching into your meal? Modernise Your Bakeware with this Versatile Glass Roasting Dish! ______________ This rectangular glass baking dish with snap locking lid and removable seal, gives you all you need to enjoy a delicious home-cooked meal or for storing leftovers. This quality glass oven-proof container will ensure your food stays fresh for longer . Lock in the Freshness : With the SnapLock system, you can be assured that nasty bacteria will stay out here, and your next meal will stay in there. Minimise Food Waste and Maximise Taste. Conveniently store freshly cooked food safely and efficiently in the fridge or freezer or store left overs thereby saving on food waste. Say no to single-use cling film and use our reusable airtight lid instead — it's dishwasher safe and made from BPA-free plastic. Igluu Meal Prep - the perfect option to help store cooked and raw food in the fridge or freezer and avoid waste. . MATERIALS & SAFETY Food safe - made from borosilicate glass. Can withstand temperatures up to 300°C BPA-FREE lid - high-quality & toxic-free Stain and odour resistant Freezer-friendly Dishwasher safe Microwave-safe Oven Safe - not the lids FEATURES Glass roasting dish 30.8cm (l) x 18.4cm (w) x 6.2cm (h) (Glass base only) Volume 2.2l (74 oz) Double handle provides a safe and secure grip from oven to table Removable silicone seal - super hygienic perfect for cooking, storing and serving straight from oven onto the dining table Clear transparent lids - for perfect visual presentation PERFECT BAKING DISH Secure lid with airtight seal - keeps food fresh for longer Leak-proof – no mess Easy to clean Save time by batch cooking ahead and freezing your favourite meals for dinner parties or special occasions Versatile container – ideal for Lasagne, casseroles, enchiladas, gratins, pies, puddings and more IGLUU THE BRAND YOU CAN TRUST ______________ After you’ve enjoyed your meal, simply toss the container in the dishwasher (lid on top rack) or quickly wash it in the sink to achieve a brand-new look, feel and smell. You can even remove and wash the seal itself! With this oven-to-table-and fridge-to-microwave dish, you can serve directly in this VERSATILE ALL-IN-ONE roaster dish without compromising on style or safety. Alternative to single-use plastic: From odour to appearance to health and environmental benefit, glass gets the job done. Join the Igluu Meal Prep family today. 1-pack Lasagna Dish 2-pack Lasagna Dish Set 3-pack Lasagna Dish Set 5-pack Glass Containers with Steam Vent Lids 10-pack Glass Containers 3-pack 1050ml Glass Containers Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 822 4.5 out of 5 stars 822 4.5 out of 5 stars 822 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,650 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,305 4.6 out of 5 stars 822 Price £20.95 £ 20 . 95 £31.95 £ 31 . 95 £40.95 £ 40 . 95 £31.95 £ 31 . 95 £39.95 £ 39 . 95 £30.95 £ 30 . 95 Compartments 1 1 1 1 1 1 Quantity 1 2 3 5 + extra lid 10 3 Capacity 2.2 L (74 oz) 2.2 L (74 oz) 2.2 L (74 oz) 840 ml (28 oz) 370 and 1050 ml 1050 ml (36 oz) BPA Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Microwaveable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Freezer Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Oven Safe glass base only glass base only glass base only glass base only glass base only glass base only
